name: Canyon of Outlaws
short_description: Step into the boots of a wild west sheriff and blast your way through a cursed frontier!
detailed_description:
Step into the boots of a wild west sheriff and blast your way through a cursed frontier!

Canyon of Outlaws is a thrilling arcade shooter set in a pixelated Wild West world gone mad. As the town’s last line of defense, you must face off against sinister undertakers, walking cacti, and other supernatural horrors threatening your peaceful frontier.

Armed with grit, guns, and a badge, you’ll fight through waves of enemies in fast-paced shootouts across vibrant, handcrafted levels. Every stage brings new enemies, new challenges, and new ways to prove your skills.

Sharpen your aim and your reflexes — only the sharpest sheriff can survive this outlaw canyon.

Features

  • Retro-style arcade shooter with modern action

  • Pixel art visuals bursting with western charm

  • Variety of enemies including undead ghouls, killer cacti, and monstrous bosses

  • Dynamic levels full of intense firefights and quick decision-making

  • Immersive western soundtrack that brings the Wild West to life

Whether you're chasing bounties, clearing towns, or facing off against towering bosses, Canyon of Outlaws delivers a rootin’-tootin’ ride through a haunted western frontier.

Grab your revolver, lock and load — it’s time to clean up this canyon!
